_administrator.name: Administrator
_administrator.description: Most cards with no tags (don't forget the corporation and Prelude cards)

_benefactor.name: Benefactor
_benefactor.description: Highest TR. If you play with this Award, count it before all other Awards and Milestones!

_biologist.name: Biologist
_biologist.description: Most bio tags combined (plant, microbe, and animal)

_celebrity.name: Celebrity
_celebrity.description: Most cards that have a cost of 20 M€ or more

_collector.name: Collector
_collector.description: Most different types of resources, both on your player board and on your cards

_founder.name: Founder
_founder.description: Most tiles adjacent to special tiles

_highlander.name: Highlander
_highlander.description: Most tiles that are not adjacent to ocean

_incorporator.name: Incorporator
_incorporator.description: Most cards costing 10 M€ or less

_landscaper.name: Landscaper
_landscaper.description: Most tiles connected together (each player counts his/her largest group of tiles)

_manufacturer.name: Manufacturer
_manufacturer.description: Highest production of steel and heat combined

_miner.name: Miner
_miner.description: Having most steel and titanium resources combined

_mogul.name: Mogul
_mogul.description: Highest production of steel, titanium, plants, energy, and heat combined (all except M€ production)

_politician.name: Politician
_politician.description: Most Party Leaders and influence combined

_promoter.name: Promoter
_promoter.description: Most cards in your event pile

_suburbian.name: Suburbian
_suburbian.description: Most tiles on areas along the edges of the map

_industrialist.name: Industrialist
_industrialist.description: Most steel and energy resources combined

_traveller.name: Traveller
_traveller.description: Most Jovian and Earth tags combined

_zoologist.name: Zoologist
_zoologist.description: Having most animal and microbe resources combined
